name: Demo
meaning: Demolition work including selective interior or exterior tear-out before new construction or renovation can begin.

subDepartments.name: Interior Demo
subDepartments.meaning: Selective interior demolition: removing walls, ceilings, flooring, cabinetry, fixtures, or finishes inside an existing structure.

subDepartments.name: Exterior Demo
subDepartments.meaning: Exterior demolition: tearing out siding, roofing, windows, doors, decks, or other exterior elements prior to replacement or renovation.

name: Framing
meaning: Structural wood or metal framing work including walls, floors, roof structures, and load-bearing components.

subDepartments.name: Wall Framing
subDepartments.meaning: New or modified interior or exterior wall framing, including partition walls, load-bearing walls, and shear walls.

subDepartments.name: Roof Framing
subDepartments.meaning: Roof structure framing including rafters, ridge beams, trusses, and roof deck sheathing.

subDepartments.name: Floor Framing
subDepartments.meaning: Floor structure framing including joists, beams, subfloor decking, and ledger boards for decks or additions.

name: Roofing
meaning: All roofing work including material installation, flashings, underlayment, and associated drainage systems.

subDepartments.name: Asphalt Shingle Roofing
subDepartments.meaning: Asphalt shingle roof installation or replacement including ice and water shield, underlayment, ridge cap, and flashings.

subDepartments.name: Metal Roofing
subDepartments.meaning: Standing seam or metal panel roof installation including structural requirements for low-pitch metal roofs.

subDepartments.name: Flat / Low-Slope Roofing
subDepartments.meaning: EPDM, TPO, or modified bitumen flat or low-slope roof systems including insulation boards and drainage details.

name: Siding & Exterior
meaning: Exterior cladding, trim, windows, doors, and related weather envelope work.

subDepartments.name: Vinyl / Fiber Cement Siding
subDepartments.meaning: Vinyl siding or fiber cement board installation including house wrap, trim, and corner pieces.

subDepartments.name: Windows & Doors
subDepartments.meaning: Window and exterior door replacement or installation including flashing, trim, and casing.

subDepartments.name: Decks & Porches
subDepartments.meaning: New deck or porch construction including framing, decking, railings, stairs, and ledger attachment.

name: Insulation
meaning: Thermal and acoustic insulation work for walls, ceilings, floors, and attic spaces.

subDepartments.name: Batt / Blown Insulation
subDepartments.meaning: Fiberglass batt, mineral wool batt, or blown-in cellulose/fiberglass insulation for walls, attics, and floors.

subDepartments.name: Spray Foam Insulation
subDepartments.meaning: Open-cell or closed-cell spray polyurethane foam insulation for rim joists, walls, rooflines, or air sealing.

name: Drywall
meaning: Drywall hanging, taping, finishing, and skim coat plaster work for interior walls and ceilings.

subDepartments.name: Hang & Tape
subDepartments.meaning: Drywall board installation, taping, and three-coat finishing to paint-ready Level 4 or Level 5 surface.

subDepartments.name: Skim Coat / Plaster
subDepartments.meaning: Skim coat plaster over existing walls or ceilings to restore or create a smooth finish surface.

name: Electrical
meaning: All electrical work including service upgrades, wiring, panels, outlets, fixtures, and code compliance items.

subDepartments.name: Service Upgrade / Rewire
subDepartments.meaning: Full electrical service panel upgrade, new main or sub-panel, or whole-home rewire with new circuits throughout.

subDepartments.name: Rough-In Wiring
subDepartments.meaning: New circuit rough-in wiring for additions, renovations, or specific rooms — boxes, wire, and breakers before drywall.

subDepartments.name: Fixtures & Devices
subDepartments.meaning: Electrical finish work: installing outlets, switches, light fixtures, ceiling fans, dimmers, and cover plates.

name: Plumbing
meaning: All plumbing work including supply and drain lines, fixtures, water heaters, and associated rough and finish work.

subDepartments.name: Rough-In / Repiping
subDepartments.meaning: New supply or drain/waste/vent rough-in piping, repiping of existing supply lines, or DWV reconfiguration.

subDepartments.name: Fixture Installation
subDepartments.meaning: Plumbing finish work: installing sinks, faucets, toilets, tubs, showers, dishwashers, and water hookups.

subDepartments.name: Water Heater
subDepartments.meaning: Water heater replacement or installation — tank, tankless, or heat pump water heater.

name: HVAC
meaning: Heating, ventilation, and air conditioning including equipment, ductwork, controls, and related mechanical systems.

subDepartments.name: Equipment Replacement
subDepartments.meaning: Full HVAC equipment replacement: furnace, central AC, heat pump, or mini-split system installation.

subDepartments.name: Ductwork
subDepartments.meaning: New duct system installation, duct modifications, supply and return register relocation, or duct sealing.

subDepartments.name: Ventilation / ERV
subDepartments.meaning: Bathroom exhaust fans, kitchen range hood venting, whole-house ERV or HRV systems, or dryer vent work.

name: Flooring
meaning: All flooring installation including subfloor prep and finish flooring materials.

subDepartments.name: LVP / Laminate
subDepartments.meaning: Luxury vinyl plank or laminate flooring installation including underlayment, transitions, and baseboards.

subDepartments.name: Hardwood
subDepartments.meaning: Solid or engineered hardwood flooring installation, sanding, and finishing.

subDepartments.name: Tile Flooring
subDepartments.meaning: Porcelain, ceramic, or natural stone tile floor installation including backer board, mortar bed, grout, and sealing.

subDepartments.name: Carpet
subDepartments.meaning: Carpet and pad installation including tack strips and transitions.

name: Tile & Stone
meaning: Wall and floor tile installation for kitchens, bathrooms, showers, and other wet or decorative areas.

subDepartments.name: Shower & Tub Surround
subDepartments.meaning: Full shower or tub surround tile installation including waterproofing membrane, backer, mortar, grout, and caulking.

subDepartments.name: Backsplash
subDepartments.meaning: Kitchen or bathroom backsplash tile installation including layout, adhesive, grout, and edge trim.

name: Cabinets & Countertops
meaning: Kitchen and bathroom cabinetry and countertop supply and installation.

subDepartments.name: Kitchen Cabinets
subDepartments.meaning: Kitchen cabinet installation including base cabinets, wall cabinets, crown molding, and hardware.

subDepartments.name: Vanity / Bath Cabinets
subDepartments.meaning: Bathroom vanity or linen cabinet installation.

subDepartments.name: Countertops
subDepartments.meaning: Countertop fabrication and installation — quartz, granite, laminate, or solid surface.

name: Painting & Finishes
meaning: Interior and exterior painting, staining, and decorative finish work.

subDepartments.name: Interior Painting
subDepartments.meaning: Interior wall, ceiling, trim, and door painting including prep, priming, and finish coats.

subDepartments.name: Exterior Painting / Staining
subDepartments.meaning: Exterior painting or staining of siding, trim, doors, and shutters including prep and primer.

name: Permits & Engineering
meaning: Building permits, engineering drawings, inspections, and code compliance documentation.

subDepartments.name: Building Permit
subDepartments.meaning: Municipal building permit application, fee, and inspection coordination for the project.

subDepartments.name: Engineering / Drawings
subDepartments.meaning: Structural engineering, architectural drawings, or site plan preparation required for permit submission.
